text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto spends her days desperately chasing
after T.M. Opera O. Meanwhile, a new star is born
at Hanshin Racecourse.

She is Admire Vega, a stoic racer of few words.
Her running today staunchly puts her in the
leading role for the Classics.

One day, at Tracen Academy, Meisho Doto
collides into Admire Vega in the hallway.
However...

Admire Vega doesn't budge an inch. The sheer
strength in her legs sends a clear message to
Meisho Doto—her skills are on another level.
